name: Thermal Efficiency
description: Calculates thermal efficiency from inlet/outlet temperatures and flow
author: NISystem
code:
# Thermal Efficiency Calculator
# Q = m_dot * Cp * (T_out - T_in)
# Efficiency = Q / P_rated * 100

T_in = tags.get(config['inlet_temp_tag'], 20)
T_out = tags.get(config['outlet_temp_tag'], 25)
flow = tags.get(config['flow_tag'], 1.0)
Cp = config.get('specific_heat', 4.186)
P_rated = config.get('rated_power', 10.0)

# Temperature difference
delta_T = T_out - T_in

# Heat transfer rate (kW)
# Assuming flow is in kg/s, Cp in kJ/kg-K
Q = flow * Cp * delta_T

# Efficiency (%)
if P_rated > 0:
    efficiency = (Q / P_rated) * 100
else:
    efficiency = 0

# Clamp efficiency to reasonable range
efficiency = max(0, min(100, efficiency))

publish('py.Delta_T', delta_T)
publish('py.Heat_Transfer', Q)
publish('py.Thermal_Efficiency', efficiency)
